title: NM modpack
description: Make Minecraft simpler and smoother. This modpack adds auto-mining, smart inventory tools, teleportation map, and easy farming — perfect for chill or beginner gameplay.
body:
NM — Lightweight & Stylish Modpack for Minecraft 

NM is a modpack designed especially for low-end PCs and players who love spending time on servers. It combines performance optimization, a modern redesigned main menu, and a collection of stylish resource packs that refresh the game’s look without sacrificing FPS.

✨ Key Features:

⚡ Performance Boost — optimized to run smoothly even on low-end hardware.

🎮 Server-Friendly — play comfortably on servers without lags or stutters.

🖥️ Redesigned Main Menu — a fresh and modern interface for a new Minecraft vibe.

🎨 Cool Resource Packs — carefully selected visuals that enhance the game while keeping it lightweight.

If you want Minecraft 1.21.7 1.21.10 to feel fast, smooth, and beautiful on any computer, NM is the perfect choice.
